title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD9: exchange roles
description: Route: J_exch / Sigma_exch / R_exch remain separate from ordinary matter routing. Allowed condition: exchange roles remain role-level or derive source/support law with zero ordinary mass double count. Forbidden condition: ordinary T_mu_nu becomes Sigma_exch or J_exch by convenience. Consequence: exchange is not ordinary matter rerouting and not repair..
